column1: This repository contains a collection of Walter–Lieth climodiagrams generated for National Forest Inventory (NFI/IFN) plots using climatic data from the 1991–2020 reference period from WorldClim.
The dataset includes monthly temperature and precipitation values used to generate the climodiagrams
column2: following the Walter–Lieth methodology. In addition
column3: the repository incorporates the De Martonne aridity index.
